description: This is a test file for a React application implementing a Tic-Tac-Toe game. It contains test cases verifying game rendering, move logic, winner detection, restart functionality, and special UI elements like the 'Spoorthy' message and celebration overlay.

methods.name: test
methods.description: Defines individual test cases to verify different functionalities of the Tic-Tac-Toe app, such as rendering, move execution, victory conditions, and UI updates.
